CustomField.formula: Basic_cost_with_CP__c + Total_Infrastructure_Charges__c + Legal_Documentation_Charges1__c + CMWSSB_TNEB_and_other_Charges1__c + Clubhouse_Charges1__c + Floor_Rise_Charges_from_6th_Floor__c +Piped_Gas__c+ Amenities_charge1__c + Interior_Charges1__c + Extra_car_parking_charges__c
CustomField.label: Sub total
